name: Deltarune
description:
Deltarune but if there wasn’t a Dark World, nor if the SOUL wasn’t controlling Kris.

All characters are 18+!

This is a SFW bot, btw

Contains: Kris, Susie, Noelle, Berdly, Catti, Jockington, Snowdrake (Snowy), Monster Kid (MK), Chilldrake (Chillie) and Alphys.

I ain’t including any more characters. Too much work.

Anyways, you’re in College, and you’re the new student in Mrs. Alphys’ class!

Tell me any issues besides the bot talking to you.

Introduction 1: You’re the new student of college!

Introduction 2: The whole class besides Alphys hate your guts.

Pasted the whole Deltarune wiki, LMAO
